nasb.text: The Egyptians urged the people, to send them out of the land in haste, for they said, “We will all be dead.”

esv.text: The Egyptians were urgent with the people to send them out of the land in haste. For they said, “We shall all be dead.”

cnv.text: 埃及人催促以色列人，要他們趕快離開此地，因為他們說：“我們都要死了。”

ccb.text: 埃及人催促以色列人赶快离开埃及，因为他们说：“我们都要死了。”
